title: Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`
* `#F7D2C4`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='20' y='40' width='360' height='200' rx='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='60' y='60' width='280' height='120' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='120' y='80' width='160' height='40' rx='5' fill='#F7D2C4'/><rect x='120' y='140' width='160' height='40' rx='5' fill='#F7D2C4'/><text x='50' y='25' font-size='18' fill='#411C56' dominant-baseline='middle'>Authentication Dashboard</text><text x='150' y='55' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>MFA Flow Control</text><text x='150' y='125' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Query Playground</text><rect x='100' y='230' width='200' height='20' rx='5' fill='#F7D2C4'/><text x='175' y='240' font-size='12' fill='#411C56'>Hint: Click on the query playground area to start testing</text></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the query playground to test different MFA settings and scenarios
Must implement a form to input a One-Time Password (OTP) from a hardware token or authenticator app
Must be fully interactive with state updates and handle multiple user scenarios

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate the correctness and completeness of the authentication flow, including the OTP input form, MFA setting selection, and query playground functionality.
Verify the functionality of the query playground, including the ability to test different MFA settings and scenarios.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
